title: potentilla rupestris var. beniczkyi
intro: Potentilla rupestris var. beniczkyi, also known as Beniczky's rocky cinquefoil, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae, which is a type of flowering plant native to Hungary. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Potentilla rupestris var. beniczkyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and skin problems.
